title: ExportVerilog spills without outputting storage
body:
In the below, (run through firtool), export verilog spills some of the `_RANDOM` slices to temporaries, but never actually outputs the temporaries.
```mlir
module {
  hw.module private @regInitRandomReuse(%clock: i1, %a: i1) -> (o1: i2, o2: i4, o3: i32, o4: i100) {
    %c0_i99 = hw.constant 0 : i99
    %c0_i31 = hw.constant 0 : i31
    %c0_i3 = hw.constant 0 : i3
    %false = hw.constant false
    %r1 = sv.reg sym @__r1__  : !hw.inout<i2>
    %0 = sv.read_inout %r1 : !hw.inout<i2>
    %r2 = sv.reg sym @__r2__  : !hw.inout<i4>
    %1 = sv.read_inout %r2 : !hw.inout<i4>
    %r3 = sv.reg sym @__r3__  : !hw.inout<i32>
    %2 = sv.read_inout %r3 : !hw.inout<i32>
    %r4 = sv.reg sym @__r4__  : !hw.inout<i100>
    %3 = sv.read_inout %r4 : !hw.inout<i100>
    %4 = comb.concat %false, %a : i1, i1
    %5 = comb.concat %c0_i3, %a : i3, i1
    %6 = comb.concat %c0_i31, %a : i31, i1
    %7 = comb.concat %c0_i99, %a : i99, i1
    sv.always posedge %clock {
      sv.passign %r1, %4 : i2
      sv.passign %r2, %5 : i4
      sv.passign %r3, %6 : i32
      sv.passign %r4, %7 : i100
    }
    sv.ifdef  "SYNTHESIS" {
    } else {
      sv.ordered {
        sv.ifdef  "FIRRTL_BEFORE_INITIAL" {
          sv.verbatim "`FIRRTL_BEFORE_INITIAL" {symbols = []}
        }
        sv.initial {
          sv.ifdef.procedural  "INIT_RANDOM_PROLOG_" {
            sv.verbatim "`INIT_RANDOM_PROLOG_" {symbols = []}
          }
          sv.ifdef.procedural  "RANDOMIZE_REG_INIT" {
            %_RANDOM = sv.logic  : !hw.inout<uarray<5xi32>>
            %c0_i32 = hw.constant 0 : i32
            %8 = sv.array_index_inout %_RANDOM[%c0_i32] : !hw.inout<uarray<5xi32>>, i32
            %RAMDOM = sv.verbatim.expr.se "`RAMDOM" : () -> i32 {symbols = []}
            sv.bpassign %8, %RAMDOM : i32
            %c1_i32 = hw.constant 1 : i32
            %9 = sv.array_index_inout %_RANDOM[%c1_i32] : !hw.inout<uarray<5xi32>>, i32
            %RAMDOM_0 = sv.verbatim.expr.se "`RAMDOM" : () -> i32 {symbols = []}
            sv.bpassign %9, %RAMDOM_0 : i32
            %c2_i32 = hw.constant 2 : i32
            %10 = sv.array_index_inout %_RANDOM[%c2_i32] : !hw.inout<uarray<5xi32>>, i32
            %RAMDOM_1 = sv.verbatim.expr.se "`RAMDOM" : () -> i32 {symbols = []}
            sv.bpassign %10, %RAMDOM_1 : i32
            %c3_i32 = hw.constant 3 : i32
            %11 = sv.array_index_inout %_RANDOM[%c3_i32] : !hw.inout<uarray<5xi32>>, i32
            %RAMDOM_2 = sv.verbatim.expr.se "`RAMDOM" : () -> i32 {symbols = []}
            sv.bpassign %11, %RAMDOM_2 : i32
            %c4_i32 = hw.constant 4 : i32
            %12 = sv.array_index_inout %_RANDOM[%c4_i32] : !hw.inout<uarray<5xi32>>, i32
            %RAMDOM_3 = sv.verbatim.expr.se "`RAMDOM" : () -> i32 {symbols = []}
            sv.bpassign %12, %RAMDOM_3 : i32
            %c0_i32_4 = hw.constant 0 : i32
            %13 = sv.array_index_inout %_RANDOM[%c0_i32_4] : !hw.inout<uarray<5xi32>>, i32
            %14 = sv.read_inout %13 : !hw.inout<i32>
            %15 = comb.extract %14 from 0 : (i32) -> i2
            sv.bpassign %r1, %15 : i2
            %c0_i32_5 = hw.constant 0 : i32
            %16 = sv.array_index_inout %_RANDOM[%c0_i32_5] : !hw.inout<uarray<5xi32>>, i32
            %17 = sv.read_inout %16 : !hw.inout<i32>
            %18 = comb.extract %17 from 2 : (i32) -> i4
            sv.bpassign %r2, %18 : i4
            %c0_i32_6 = hw.constant 0 : i32
            %19 = sv.array_index_inout %_RANDOM[%c0_i32_6] : !hw.inout<uarray<5xi32>>, i32
            %20 = sv.read_inout %19 : !hw.inout<i32>
            %21 = comb.extract %20 from 6 : (i32) -> i26
            %c1_i32_7 = hw.constant 1 : i32
            %22 = sv.array_index_inout %_RANDOM[%c1_i32_7] : !hw.inout<uarray<5xi32>>, i32
            %23 = sv.read_inout %22 : !hw.inout<i32>
            %24 = comb.extract %23 from 0 : (i32) -> i6
            %25 = comb.concat %21, %24 : i26, i6
            sv.bpassign %r3, %25 : i32
            %c1_i32_8 = hw.constant 1 : i32
            %26 = sv.array_index_inout %_RANDOM[%c1_i32_8] : !hw.inout<uarray<5xi32>>, i32
            %27 = sv.read_inout %26 : !hw.inout<i32>
            %28 = comb.extract %27 from 6 : (i32) -> i26
            %c2_i32_9 = hw.constant 2 : i32
            %29 = sv.array_index_inout %_RANDOM[%c2_i32_9] : !hw.inout<uarray<5xi32>>, i32
            %30 = sv.read_inout %29 : !hw.inout<i32>
            %c3_i32_10 = hw.constant 3 : i32
            %31 = sv.array_index_inout %_RANDOM[%c3_i32_10] : !hw.inout<uarray<5xi32>>, i32
            %32 = sv.read_inout %31 : !hw.inout<i32>
            %c4_i32_11 = hw.constant 4 : i32
            %33 = sv.array_index_inout %_RANDOM[%c4_i32_11] : !hw.inout<uarray<5xi32>>, i32
            %34 = sv.read_inout %33 : !hw.inout<i32>
            %35 = comb.extract %34 from 0 : (i32) -> i10
            %36 = comb.concat %28, %30, %32, %35 : i26, i32, i32, i10
            sv.bpassign %r4, %36 : i100
          }
        }
        sv.ifdef  "FIRRTL_AFTER_INITIAL" {
          sv.verbatim "`FIRRTL_AFTER_INITIAL" {symbols = []}
        }
      }
    }
    hw.output %0, %1, %2, %3 : i2, i4, i32, i100
  }
}
```

See?  No `automatic logic _GEN`

```verilog
// Generated by CIRCT sifive/1/14/0-12-g3edf13e94-dirty
module regInitRandomReuse(      // <stdin>:2:3
  input         clock,
                a,
  output [1:0]  o1,
  output [3:0]  o2,
  output [31:0] o3,
  output [99:0] o4);

  reg [1:0]  r1;        // <stdin>:7:11
  reg [3:0]  r2;        // <stdin>:9:11
  reg [31:0] r3;        // <stdin>:11:11
  reg [99:0] r4;        // <stdin>:13:11
  always @(posedge clock) begin // <stdin>:19:5
    r1 <= {1'h0, a};    // <stdin>:6:14, :15:10, :20:7
    r2 <= {3'h0, a};    // <stdin>:5:14, :16:10, :21:7
    r3 <= {31'h0, a};   // <stdin>:4:15, :17:10, :22:7
    r4 <= {99'h0, a};   // <stdin>:3:15, :18:10, :23:7
  end // always @(posedge)
  `ifndef SYNTHESIS     // <stdin>:25:5
    `ifdef FIRRTL_BEFORE_INITIAL        // <stdin>:28:9
      `FIRRTL_BEFORE_INITIAL    // <stdin>:29:11
    `endif
    initial begin       // <stdin>:31:9
      automatic logic [31:0] _RANDOM[0:4];      // <stdin>:36:24
      `ifdef INIT_RANDOM_PROLOG_        // <stdin>:32:11
        `INIT_RANDOM_PROLOG_    // <stdin>:33:13
      `endif
      `ifdef RANDOMIZE_REG_INIT // <stdin>:35:11
        _RANDOM[32'h0] = `RAMDOM;       // <stdin>:37:23, :38:18, :39:23, :40:13
        _RANDOM[32'h1] = `RAMDOM;       // <stdin>:41:23, :42:18, :43:25, :44:13
        _RANDOM[32'h2] = `RAMDOM;       // <stdin>:45:23, :46:19, :47:25, :48:13
        _RANDOM[32'h3] = `RAMDOM;       // <stdin>:49:23, :50:19, :51:25, :52:13
        _RANDOM[32'h4] = `RAMDOM;       // <stdin>:53:23, :54:19, :55:25, :56:13
        _GEN = _RANDOM[32'h0];  // <stdin>:37:23, :38:18, :59:19
        r1 = _GEN[1:0]; // <stdin>:60:19, :61:13
        _GEN_0 = _RANDOM[32'h0];        // <stdin>:37:23, :38:18, :59:19
        r2 = _GEN_0[5:2];       // <stdin>:65:19, :66:13
        _GEN_1 = _RANDOM[32'h0];        // <stdin>:37:23, :38:18, :59:19
        _GEN_2 = _RANDOM[32'h1];        // <stdin>:41:23, :42:18, :73:19
        r3 = {_GEN_1[31:6], _GEN_2[5:0]};       // <stdin>:70:19, :74:19, :75:19, :76:13
        _GEN_3 = _RANDOM[32'h1];        // <stdin>:41:23, :42:18, :73:19
        _GEN_4 = _RANDOM[32'h4];        // <stdin>:53:23, :54:19, :89:19
        r4 = {_GEN_3[31:6], _RANDOM[32'h2], _RANDOM[32'h3], _GEN_4[9:0]};       // <stdin>:45:23, :46:19, :49:23, :50:19, :80:19, :83:19, :86:19, :90:19, :91:19, :92:13
      `endif
    end // initial
    `ifdef FIRRTL_AFTER_INITIAL // <stdin>:95:9
      `FIRRTL_AFTER_INITIAL     // <stdin>:96:11
    `endif
  `endif
  assign o1 = r1;       // <stdin>:8:10, :100:5
  assign o2 = r2;       // <stdin>:10:10, :100:5
  assign o3 = r3;       // <stdin>:12:10, :100:5
  assign o4 = r4;       // <stdin>:14:10, :100:5
endmodule
```
